title: Room Attendant
description: Job Description: We're recruiting on behalf of a hotel group in St. Julian's for experienced Room Attendants to join their housekeeping team ahead of peak season.

Key Responsibilities: Maintain guest rooms to a 4-star standard, restock amenities, report maintenance issues. Requirements: Prior housekeeping experience preferred. Physically able to stand/walk for full shifts. Basic spoken English.

title: Chef de Partie
description: Job Description: A Valletta restaurant group is looking for a Chef de Partie to run a specific station in a busy kitchen.

Key Responsibilities: Manage a kitchen section during service, maintain food safety standards, train junior kitchen staff. Requirements: 2+ years of kitchen experience in a similar-sized operation. Trade tested on practical cooking skills before shortlisting.

title: Retail Sales Associate
description: Job Description: A retail chain with stores across Malta is hiring Sales Associates for its Sliema location.
Key Responsibilities: Customer service on the shop floor, stock replenishment, till operations. Requirements: Retail or customer-facing experience. Conversational English required.

title: Mason
description: Job Description: A construction contractor operating across multiple Maltese sites needs experienced Masons for ongoing residential projects.

Key Responsibilities: Blockwork, plastering, and general masonry on active construction sites. Requirements: Verified trade experience — all candidates complete a practical trade test before being shortlisted.

title: Electrician
description: Job Description: Site electrician needed for residential and commercial construction projects across Malta.

Key Responsibilities: First and second fix electrical work, reading site drawings, working to Maltese electrical code. Requirements: Recognized electrical trade qualification or verified equivalent experience.

title: F&B Supervisor
description: Job Description: A hotel group in Qawra needs an F&B Supervisor to oversee front-of-house restaurant and bar operations.

Key Responsibilities: Supervise service staff, manage shift rotas, maintain service standards during peak hours. Requirements: Prior supervisory experience in hospitality F&B. Team leadership experience required.
